patterns.name: RAG over line-of-business data
patterns.summary: Retrieval-augmented generation grounded on an agency line-of-business system plus a status/lookup API, surfaced through chat or an agent-assist panel.

patterns.name: Document intelligence / extraction
patterns.summary: Extract structured fields from forms, PDFs, and scans to reduce manual data entry and speed case processing.

patterns.name: Copilot-assisted form & notice automation
patterns.summary: Generate and pre-fill citizen-facing notices and forms with human-in-the-loop review, including multilingual output.
